creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Addressed by ports/169355
 
 With that PR, lang/erlang now looks for standard KNOBS for ODBC,
 UNIXODBC and IODBC to determine if and what ODBC bits to build.
 
 In the meantime, you can set DRIVER_MANAGER=unixodbc in /etc/make.conf
 to get the same behaviour with the existing version of the port
